risk.mit: Ensure wall thickness meets dimensional realism requirements and conduct CMM inspection.

risk.desc: Potential thermal mismatch between Al 7075 and CFRP could lead to stress concentration.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal cycling tests and apply thermal barrier coatings.

risk.desc: Inconel fasteners may be overkill for a display model, increasing cost.
risk.mit: Evaluate cost-benefit of using less expensive materials for non-critical components.

risk.desc: Ablative material may not be necessary for an indoor display model.
risk.mit: Consider alternative materials that do not require ablation properties.

risk.desc: LPBF process may introduce porosity in Al 7075, affecting structural integrity.
risk.mit: Implement post-processing steps to reduce porosity, such as HIP or EBM.

risk.desc: CFRP layup may require additional curing steps, adding complexity.
risk.mit: Optimize layup process to minimize curing steps and reduce cycle time.
